title: ceterach pozoi
intro: Ceterach pozoi, also known as the Rock Whitlow-grass or Rock Whitlow, is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the fern family. Traditionally, Ceterach pozoi has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and pain, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ceterach pozoi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate arthritis symptoms, and aid in wound healing. Ceterach pozoi can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
